Wei-Shaw/sub2api ·GitHub ⭐ 5060 Go · API Gateway, LLM Gateway, Quota Management, Billing, Claude Code, Antigravity, Open Source

What it is

Sub2API is a sophisticated AI API gateway platform tailored for distributing and managing high-value AI subscriptions (such as Claude Code or Antigravity). It allows organizations or individual developers to pool multiple AI accounts and provide access via a single, OpenAI-compatible API with built-in billing, load balancing, and concurrency control.

Problems solved

  • Inefficient manual sharing of AI product subscriptions within teams
  • Lack of token-level usage tracking and cost calculation for shared AI accounts
  • Difficulty in building a stable API layer on top of 'per-account' rate-limited AI services

How to get started

Deploy via the one-click installation script or Docker Compose. Use the admin dashboard to add upstream accounts (API Keys or OAuth). Users then connect using platform-generated keys. It features dedicated endpoints for specialized services like Antigravity Claude and Gemini.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Wei-Shaw/sub2api is positioned as a sub2api is a sophisticated ai api gateway platform tailored for distributing and managing high-value ai subscriptions (such as claude code or antigravity). it allows organizations or individual developers to pool multiple ai accounts and provide access via a single, openai-compatible api with built-in billing, load balancing, and concurrency control. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Go-based solution for sub2api-crs2 一站式开源中转服务，让 claude、openai 、gemini、antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Inefficient manual sharing of AI product subscriptions within teams. Wei-Shaw/sub2api addresses this by sub2api is a sophisticated ai api gateway platform tailored for distributing and managing high-value ai subscriptions (such as claude code or antigravity). it allows organizations or individual developers to pool multiple ai accounts and provide access via a single, openai-compatible api with built-in billing, load balancing, and concurrency control, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Go, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

The implementation utilizes Go's strengths to provide sub2api is a sophisticated ai api gateway platform tailored for distributing and managing high-value ai subscriptions (such as claude code or antigravity). it allows organizations or individual developers to pool multiple ai accounts and provide access via a single, openai-compatible api with built-in billing, load balancing, and concurrency control, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, deploy via the one-click installation script or docker compose. use the admin dashboard to add upstream accounts (api keys or oauth). users then connect using platform-generated keys. it features dedicated endpoints for specialized services like antigravity claude and gemini. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.
